expectations.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.md exists at the expected path

expectations.text: Report correctly identifies the project's tech stack
expectations.evidence: 'Runtime: Node.js (ES modules), Framework: Express 5, Dependencies: Only express and dotenv'

expectations.text: Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
expectations.evidence: Report is primarily descriptive — it maps the architecture and design decisions but does not identify problems or improvements. No severity ratings, no findings structure. It reads as an overview, not an analysis.

expectations.text: Report includes a 'what's working well' section
expectations.evidence: No explicit section. Positive observations are woven throughout ('intentionally minimal', 'well-organized') but not structured.

expectations.text: Report gives a clear picture of major components and relationships
expectations.evidence: Excellent project structure diagram, single webhook endpoint explanation, tool handler pattern, security layer description, and relationship table showing crm-web + this repo

expectations.text: Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
Report would help a new developer understand the codebase
expectations.evidence: Very strong newcomer orientation — project structure tree, architecture shape section, key design decisions, and maturity/status assessment. This is an excellent onboarding document.
